data.title: Kin to Tetsu
data.synopsis:
Dante's life on Amigasa seemed normal enough to him, even though everyone around him called him an oddball. But when a chance meeting with a young woman named Aoi changes everything, Dante can no longer sit idly by...unless, of course, he is made to!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

data.title: Hone Dragon no Mana Musume
data.synopsis:
In the Forest of Scraps, a place where all manner of things are discarded, an old dragon sleeps away his final days—that is, until an abandoned child suddenly appears before him. The tiny human is Eve, and despite being only five years of age, she has somehow endured the many dangers that surround them. In an act of pity, the dragon decides to raise her as his own...but his time is still running out.

After five years together, he takes his last breath, leaving his precious daughter on her own. Little does the dragon know, Eve is capable of more than he realizes, and their reunion may be sooner than he thinks...

Hoping to improve Eve's control over her magical abilities before his resurrected body gives out, the skull dragon sets out on an adventure with his reckless human daughter—but who knows what kind of trouble awaits them?

(Source: J-Novel Club)

data.title: Zhe Tian Movie: Bei Guan Zhan Wang Teng
data.title_english: Shrouding the Heavens: The Imperial Path
data.title_japanese: 遮天剧场版 背棺战王腾
title_synonyms: Shrounding the Heavens Movie: Fighting Against Wang Teng with Copper Coffin
Zhe Tian Juchang Ban: Bei Guan Zhan Wang Teng
data.synopsis:
Ye Fan and Wang Teng, two top geniuses, face each other in a fated battle. The Wang family from Beiyuan arrives with great power, while the Ji family’s elder is secretly plotting something, and Ji Ziyue is forced into a political marriage. Surrounded by enemies, Ye Fan becomes everyone’s target. As the Ancient Sacred Body clashes with ancient powers, who will rise as the true Great Emperor?

(Source: WeTV)
data.background: Adaptation of Chen Dong's (辰东) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Onaji Semi no Someya-san ga Sexy Joyuu datta Hanashi.
同じゼミの染谷さんがセクシー女優だった話。
My Classmate's a Sexy Actress, and Now We Live Together?!

data.title: Onaji Semi no Someya-san ga Sexy Joyuu datta Hanashi.
data.title_english: My Classmate's a Sexy Actress, and Now We Live Together?!
data.title_japanese: 同じゼミの染谷さんがセクシー女優だった話。
data.synopsis:
Ryousuke Kamiya, who notices while watching porn one day that his college classmate Ruuka Someya is starring in the video he is watching. When Ryousuke privately asks Ruuka about it, she tells him that she will have sex with him if he doesn't tell anyone.

(Source: ANN, edited)

titles.title: Guimi Zhi Zhu: Wu Mian Ren
诡秘之主 无面人篇

data.title: Guimi Zhi Zhu: Wu Mian Ren
title_synonyms: 诡秘之主 无面人篇
data.synopsis:
After his resurrection, Klein, now known as Sherlock, becomes a private detective. While taking on cases, he inadvertently provokes a spy organization. With the help of his bodyguard Sharron, as well as the assistance of Audrey and others, he faces many enemies, including the powerful Ambassador of Intis. In a later case, Klein unexpectedly discovers ruins from the Tudor dynasty. While continuing his detective work, Klein searches for clues to his advancement while also pursuing his enemies, Lanevus and Intis…

(Source: Tencent, translated & edited)
